name: stupid-ai
description: stupid-ai — Claude Code plugins for AI work that should not drift: auto-loop plans, explicit human gates, and auditable execution.

plugins.name: human-plan
plugins.description: An auto-looping Human Plan workflow: run batch scan loops, stop at confirm/approve gates, track tokens, implement after approval, and audit the result.

plugins.name: human-prompt
plugins.description: A prompt-alignment loop that turns short requests into approved Prompt Briefs for execution context.

plugins.name: code-cleanup
plugins.description: Build a complete code-free baseline for the declared product scope, then systematically rescan and clean that scope with mandatory file coverage and persistent batch state.

plugins.name: repo-guardian
plugins.description: 以证据驱动仓库治理：审计真实问题、完成并验证改进、决定项目下一步。
